idea: Containerized FastAPI health and release notes service
why_this_project_matters: This project teaches the basics of image creation, dependency pinning, container health checks, and local orchestration with a small but realistic API.
architecture: A single FastAPI container is built from a slim Python base image and started through Docker Compose. Compose maps a single application port, passes runtime configuration through environment variables, and enables a health check endpoint for container status validation.
steps: Review the FastAPI application and confirm the health and release endpoints match the project goal.
Build the image with docker compose build to validate the Dockerfile and dependency layer.
Start the stack with docker compose up and confirm the /health endpoint returns healthy.
Inspect container logs and verify the environment variable is injected correctly.
Extend the API with another endpoint or a small persistence layer once the base workflow is stable.
